title: Renode peripherals emulation
description: Decompose and implement/update C# peripherals (SX1262 updates, BLE, LR1110, GPS) in lichen/boards/renode/peripherals/. Follow existing patterns from SX1262.cs, LR1110.cs, BLE.cs. Fix RX, SPI easyDMA, FICR DEVICEID, CS handling, GPIO wiring per validation notes. No dead code. West build + Renode tests required.
